backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a community post board with CRUD operations for posts categorized as internships, hackathons, courses, or general, plus stats aggregation (category counts, top upvoted/connected posts). Uses MixinStorage for blob storage and an in-memory Map for post persistence.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (brand font, dot-grid background, spark particles, sounds, dashboard polling, etc.) to their affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs for build verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for build planning and feature tracking.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with the page title 'Memu Nerchukunnavi | మేము నేర్చుకున్నవి' that mounts the React app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (home, share, post detail, dashboard, about) wrapped in a LanguageProvider and a year-gate that shows YearSelectionModal until a year is chosen.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering the sticky header with the 'Memu Nerchukunnavi' brand logo (font-brand), navigation links, mute/language toggles, SparkParticles background, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a single post, displaying category badge, time ago, content snippet, author year, like/follow counts, and share buttons with a link to the full post page.
frontend/src/components/ShareButtons.tsx: Provides share action buttons (WhatsApp, copy link, native share) for a post, with compact and full display modes and i18n support.
frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.t: Renders animated floating pill-shaped particles in the background showing college year labels, using a seeded random generator for deterministic positioning and styling.
frontend/src/components/YearSelectionMod: Full-screen modal that prompts new users to select their college year and optionally enter their college name before entering the app, with language toggle support.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context that manages English/Telugu language state (persisted in sessionStorage) and exposes a translation lookup function via the useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous based on identity) and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity state for Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all posts, posts by category, a single post, and stats, plus a mutation hook for creating posts, all using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useYearSelection.ts: Provides a hook to get and set the user's college year and college name using sessionStorage, with a predefined set of year options.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for a pastel violet/mint theme, and adds a dot-grid background pattern with utility classes and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page describing the Memu Nerchukunnavi platform's mission, how-it-works steps, and core values with a banner image and styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying platform stats (total posts, upvotes, connections), top posts by upvotes and connects, category breakdown, and year distribution using data from query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page showing a trending posts section and a filterable list of posts by category, with skeleton loading states and category tab navigation.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetail.tsx: Displays a single post's full details including category badge, content, author info, upvote/connect buttons, and share options, with loading skeleton and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ShareExperience.tsx: Provides a form page for submitting a new experience post with category selection, content textarea with character limit, validation, and a success screen after submission.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Defines English and Telugu translation strings for all UI text across the app, exported as a typed translations object keyed by language code.
frontend/src/utils/sounds.ts: Provides Web Audio API utilities for playing a bubble-pop tone and a typing tick sound, with session-storage-based mute toggle support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the app's design system.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of all implemented features for the college feedback-sharing platform.
